projects.title: RedPitaya Instrument Control
projects.description: Python-based control and acquisition software for the Red Pitaya STEMlab FPGA board. Designed for lock-in detection, PID stabilisation, and real-time signal processing in optical spectroscopy experiments.

projects.title: Digital Holography Reconstruction
projects.description: Numerical reconstruction toolkit for off-axis digital holography. Implements Fourier-domain filtering, wavefront propagation, and phase retrieval routines used in hyperspectral dual-comb holography experiments.

projects.title: Multilayer Anisotropic Transfer Matrix
projects.description: Transfer matrix method for computing reflection, transmission, and field profiles in stratified anisotropic optical media. Supports uniaxial and biaxial layers, useful for modelling polariton and near-field responses.
